title: Curriculum quality: evaluating the impact of the education inspection framework
body: "This research highlights the part the EIF has played in improving curriculum quality in schools. It aimed to:   assess whether curriculum quality has changed since we introduced the EIF  understand what role school leaders think the EIF played in changes in relation to other factors explore any unintended consequences of the EIF    This study repeats curriculum research carried out in 2018, giving us an opportunity to directly compare curriculum quality before and after EIF implementation.  "
